content.text:
Now I have a clear picture. Let me address the comments:

1. Add a dedicated foreground token for accent backgrounds (high-contrast in both modes).
2. Replace `text-flux-card` with the new token at 6 sites where it sits on `bg-flux-accent`.
3. Remove `outline-none` from the weight input and notes textarea.

+     both themes, so we use a deep forest tone here to clear WCAG AA
+     (~6.9:1) on the same background regardless of mode. */

file.content:
{
  "name": "flux",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "private": true,
  "description": "Umbrella app: Workouts, Meditate, Check-in",
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vite",
    "build": "tsc -b && vite build",
    "preview": "vite preview",
    "typecheck": "tsc -b --noEmit",
    "test": "playwright test",
    "validate-catalog": "tsx scripts/validate-catalog.ts"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@capacitor/android": "^6.2.0",
    "@capacitor/app": "^6.0.2",
    "@capacitor/core": "^6.2.0",
    "@capacitor/haptics": "^6.0.2",
    "preact": "^10.25.4"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@capacitor/cli": "^6.2.0",
    "@playwright/test": "1.57.0",
    "@preact/preset-vite": "^2.10.1",
    "autoprefixer": "^10.4.20",
    "postcss": "^8.4.49",
    "tailwindcss": "^3.4.17",
    "tsx": "^4.22.1",
    "typescript": "^5.7.2",
    "vite": "^5.4.11"
  }
}

  global :focus-visible ring is visible to keyboard users.

content.text:
All four review comments addressed, fix committed in `ec5f297` and pushed. Replies posted to each comment.

**Summary**

- **Contrast (comments 919 & 922)**: introduced a `--flux-accent-fg` token (`#252b26`) and matching `text-flux-accent-fg` Tailwind color. Replaced `text-flux-card` (cream) on `bg-flux-accent` (mint) in all 6 affected sites — tabs, mode toggle, Done/difficulty chips, and the two Workouts CTAs. New ratio is ~6.9:1 in both themes (vs the previous ~2:1).
- **Focus rings (comments 923 & 943)**: dropped `outline-none` from the weight input and notes textarea, so the global `:focus-visible` ring from `index.css` is no longer suppressed.

Verification: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build`, and all 15 Playwright tests passed.

result:
All four review comments addressed, fix committed in `ec5f297` and pushed. Replies posted to each comment.

**Summary**

- **Contrast (comments 919 & 922)**: introduced a `--flux-accent-fg` token (`#252b26`) and matching `text-flux-accent-fg` Tailwind color. Replaced `text-flux-card` (cream) on `bg-flux-accent` (mint) in all 6 affected sites — tabs, mode toggle, Done/difficulty chips, and the two Workouts CTAs. New ratio is ~6.9:1 in both themes (vs the previous ~2:1).
- **Focus rings (comments 923 & 943)**: dropped `outline-none` from the weight input and notes textarea, so the global `:focus-visible` ring from `index.css` is no longer suppressed.

Verification: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build`, and all 15 Playwright tests passed.
